goal: Create the maintainable Chrome MV3 extension source project under extensions/web-agents-extension.
non_goals: Do not implement all provider adapters in this task.
Do not replace the existing local-fixed extension.
Do not add automatic sending behavior.
acceptance_criteria: extensions/web-agents-extension exists with package.json, manifest, Vite, TypeScript, React, and build scripts.
Source folders exist for background, content, ui, adapters, mcp, permissions, sessions, and i18n.
Chinese is the default UI language and English resources exist.
The extension build output can be loaded by Chrome as an unpacked MV3 extension.
Typecheck and build commands are documented and runnable.
